creator: freebsd@darkain.com
text:
I'm building this again on a new system, and I think that's a good thing. Already found something I missed in the initial patch, which will need addressed.

/compat/linux/usr/lib/ld-linux-aarch64.so.1

This file is missing from the plist file in emulators/linux_base-c7

I believe I manually copied this file when I was doing my initial testing.
